---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a rendering issue, typescript warning, or state sync error to help us refine the sandbox experience
title: "[BUG] <Short description of the bug>"
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []

---

## Describe the Bug 🐛
Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g. state sync issue in the chat hub sidebar, responsive overflow on the landing page, typescript type assignments error).

## Steps to Reproduce 🚶
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '/login' or '/dashboard'
2. Click on 'Marketplace' or 'Direct Chat'
3. Perform action: '...'
4. See error: '...'

## Expected Behavior 🤔
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Video Clips 📸
If applicable, add screenshots or video clips to help explain your problem.

## System Configuration 💻
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]
- Node Version: [e.g. v18.16.0]

## Additional Context 💡
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. typescript error stack, specific local storage variables).
